summary: Verified Awards badge redesign and Sponsors package UI on EventDetailPage at /events/eb488c54-2ee9-4160-b851-548846ec1038. All 5 award badges render as medal-style (outer gradient ring + inner circle + Award icon + ribbon tails) each cycling through gold/silver/bronze/purple/green themes. All 4 sponsor cards (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze) render with colored header strip, amount, and full checkmark benefits list. Mobile responsive verified: sponsor grid collapses to 1 column at both 390px and 768px viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: EventDetailPage.jsx is 605 lines and heavy with inline styles; consider extracting AwardBadge and SponsorCard into small components under /components/public/ for reusability and readability.

The mobile CSS rule uses positional selector `[data-testid="sponsors-section"] > div > div:last-child` which is brittle to DOM changes; consider adding a dedicated class like `sponsors-grid` for clarity.
Award color cycle uses inline array inside .map (recomputed each render); safe here but could move badgeColors constant outside the component.
test_credentials: Not required (public page verified without auth)
seed_data_creation: None (used existing event eb488c54-2ee9-4160-b851-548846ec1038 with 5 awards and 4 sponsors as noted in the request)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Awards rendered via data-testid='award-badge-{index}' (0..4). Sponsors rendered via data-testid='sponsor-card-{index}' (0..3). Sponsor header uses backend s.color (Platinum purple #7c3aed, Gold amber/orange, Silver gray, Bronze brown-rust). Mobile <=768px correctly collapses sponsor grid to single column (verified card widths 342px @390 and 720px @768).
